docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GARDNER, KENNETH ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT LUKAS, SUZANNE GABRIELLE TASHJIAN, EMILIE J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
